title: Bazi Personal Ip Character AI
sourceTitle: Bazi Personal IP Character AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical Bazi-based personal IP character sheet. Full-body fantasy mascot character, close-up portrait, props, color palette, small report notes. English labels: Five Elements, Core Energy, Signature Color, Guardian Object, Outfit Notes, Character Traits. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Bazi Personal IP Character V1. visible text language: English only.
imagePrompts.title: Bazi Personal IP Character V1 English Regeneration 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical character design sheet for a Bazi personal avatar, modern mystic style. Include hero character, side profile, accessories, elemental icons, color chips. English labels: Metal Energy, Career Aura, Lucky Item, Personality Keywords, Outfit Formula. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Bazi Personal IP Character V1. visible text language: English only.
